title: Shoot Giant Robots and Wallrun
description:
Shoot Giant Robots and Wallrun is an adrenaline rush incarnate, condensed into an easy-to-pick-up, wave-based arena shooter. 

Fight endless hordes of robots in hand-crafted arenas, all while running around at comically fast speeds. There is no lore; the story does not matter. There is no long-winded campaign. The moment you enter the arena, it is ON. 

 

• Aggressive combat design where you take what you need from your enemies. Shoot a robot to get health, or melee it with your buzzsaw to recover ammo. 

• Movement, movement, and more movement. Run along walls, swing from monkey bars, rocket-jump, slide, launch from jump-pads, pull yourself towards walls with a grappling hook, bunny-hop for extra speed, and more.

• Diverse enemies that demand mastery, each with unique designs and behaviors. They might shoot you from afar, or get in close for a melee swing. They may stand back and make you come to them, or sneak behind you for a hard-hitting chomp. Bullets might be blazing fast to demand arena knowledge, or intimidatingly slow to make you weave through them - all in the name of making you use your abilities to their full potential.

• 8 weapons to wield, each with special alt-fires. Discharge your shotgun backwards to fly into the air, fill your assault rifle with more juice to give it more power, or create devastating waves of energy that slice through opponents.

• Online leaderboards. Compete with your friends to see who can get the highest score.

• Modify each run using a unique pick-your-poison shop system, where every purchase changes the rules in absurd ways. Want to upgrade yourself? Gotta buy a few downgrades first.

• An original soundtrack created by the developer himself that floods the soundscape with distorted synthesizers and low-tuned guitars.
description_short: Mow down an endless horde of robots, flying through hand-crafted arenas at breakneck speeds in an FPS adrenaline rush.
